title: What Is An Example Of A Hazmat Employee
source_filename: What Is An Example Of A Hazmat Employee.docx

qas.q: Materials or substances that pose unreasonable risk to health, safety, and properties are called
Which is not an example of a HAZMAT employee?
qas.a: A guard checking installation gate locks

qas.q: The HAZMAT Training and Familiarization course gives you the information you need to receive a CDL HAZMAT endorsement.
The Northeast Ammunition Plant plans to ship pallets of 105mm artillery shells by vessel. Is this an acceptable mode of HAZMAT transportation?
Which form is used to verify driver documentation?
Which is not a requirement to pass a DD Form 626 inspection?
Which item would cause a DD Form 626 vehicle inspection to fail?
What type of hazard class division is identified?
What placard or label would be used for a poisonous material?
What type of hazard is identified?
What compatibility group does this label display?
What is the Proper Shipping Name (PSN) for the material on this JHCS data sheet?
What is the compatibility group for the material on this JHCS data sheet?
The material's basic description in this SDS is UN1203, Gasoline, ___, and PG1.
HAZMAT means materials or substances capable of posing an unreasonable risk to which three things?
Which two of the following topics does the HAZMAT Familiarization and Safety in Transportation course cover?
Which three modes are used to transport HAZMAT?
How often is a vehicle carrying HAZMAT inspected?
qas.a: Before and after it's loaded and before it's unloaded

qas.q: The purpose of compatibility group letters is to
qas.a: ship or store combinations of explosives safely

qas.q: What is the NSN for the material on this JHCS data sheet?
What are two types of information you can find on an SDS for a Hazard Class 6 material, like pesticide?
Based on the 49 CFR HAZMAT Table, what is the packing group for an item with the proper shipping name: Black powder for small arms?
Based on the 49 CFR HAZMAT Table, what is the hazard class for an item with the proper shipping name: Corrosive solids, n.o.s.?
A truck hauling Hazard Class 1.1 items crashed on a highway. Which ERG guide number will first responders use?
You need to find emergency procedures for HAZMAT with ID number UN1203. Which ERG section will you start with?
Based of this steel drum, does the DD Form 2890 match the package markings and containers?
qas.a: No. All three hazards should be listed on the shipping papers

qas.q: Protective packaging requirements for HAZMAT are identified by the
What is the subsidiary hazard class for the material described on this DD Form 2890?
What is the ERG guide number for the material described on this DD Form 2890?
What is the proper shipping name for this package?
Are the placards on this vehicle hauling HAZMAT correctly placed?
qas.a: No. Four placards on the front, back, and sides are required
